creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I modified the regex from
Affected files matches regexp @/Mk/.*$@
to
Affected files matches regexp @/(Mk|Keywords|Templates)/.*$@


https://reviews.freebsd.org/herald/test/ says that for D3747

H12 Ports Framework
	Conditions	
	Passed	Repository is any of rP
	Passed	Affected files matches regexp @/(Mk|Keywords|Templates)/.*$@
	Passed	Rule passed.

	Action: Add blocking reviewers	
	Dry Run	This was a dry run, so no actions were taken.
